Title: Test Login Process
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Click the "Sign In" button

Title: Test Invalid Login Attempt
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter an invalid email address
3. Enter an invalid password
4. Click the "Sign In" button
Expected Result: Login fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: Test Sign Up Process
Test Data: Valid email, password, and confirmation password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter the same password in the confirmation field
5. Click the "Sign Up" button

Title: Test Sign Up with Invalid Email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter an invalid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter the same password in the confirmation field
5. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result: Sign-up fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: Test Sign Up with Invalid Password
Test Data: Valid email, invalid password, and confirmation password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter an invalid password
4. Enter the same invalid password in the confirmation field
5. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result: Sign-up fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: Test Sign Up with Different Passwords
Test Data: Valid email, password, and different confirmation password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter a different password in the confirmation field
5. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result: Sign-up fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: Test Change Password
Test Data: Current password, new password, and confirmation password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page
2. Click the "Change Password" button
3. Enter the current password
4. Enter a new password
5. Enter the same new password in the confirmation field
6. Click the "Change Password" button

Title: Test Change Password with Invalid Current Password
Test Data: Invalid current password, new password, and confirmation password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page
2. Click the "Change Password" button
3. Enter an invalid current password
4. Enter a new password
5. Enter the same new password in the confirmation field
6. Click the "Change Password" button
Expected Result: Password change fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: Test Update User Information
Test Data: New first name, new last name, and new email address
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page
2. Click the "Update Information" button
3. Enter a new first name
4. Enter a new last name
5. Enter a new email address
6. Click the "Update Information" button

Title: Test Update User Information with Invalid Email
Test Data: New first name, new last name, and invalid email address
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page
2. Click the "Update Information" button
3. Enter a new first name
4. Enter a new last name
5. Enter an invalid email address
6. Click the "Update Information" button
Expected Result: User information update fails, and an error message is displayed
